title: AN ACT DECLARING JULY 23 OF EACH YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF TANAUAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS TO BE KNOWN AS "APOLINARIO MABINI DAY"

chunks.text:
H. No. 4575 / 103 OG No. 35, 5597 (Aug. 27, 2007)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9430, April 10, 2007 ]

AN ACT DECLARING JULY 23 OF EACH YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF TANAUAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS TO BE KNOWN AS "APOLINARIO MABINI DAY"

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. To commemorate the birth anniversary of Apolinario Mabini, national here and illustrious son of the City of Tanauan, Province of Batangas, July 23 of each year is hereby declared a special working holiday in the said city to be known as "Apolinario Mabini Day".

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

(Sgd.) MANNY VILLAR

Speaker of the House of Representatives

President of the Senate

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 7, 2007 and January 22, 2007, respectively.

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: APR 10 2007

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
